message:
feat(beads): add epic for expanding package distribution across tools

Create new planning epic (bd-90x4) to track the effort of expanding
Homebrew and Scoop package distribution to additional tools in the
Dicklesworthstone ecosystem.

The epic documents:
- Current state: 5 tools already distributed (cass, xf, cm, ru, ubs)
- "Coming Soon" Go tools needing GoReleaser: ntm, bv, caam, slb
- Additional Python/other tools to evaluate: mcp_agent_mail,
  smartedgar_mcp, ultrasearch, destructive_command_guard, llm_docs
- Platform support matrix targets for different tool categories
- Success criteria including auto-updates and end-to-end testing
- Architecture decisions for handling compiled binaries vs scripts
  vs Python tools
- Risk mitigations for tools without stable releases or complex
  packaging requirements

This epic provides a roadmap for making the full tooling ecosystem
accessible via standard package managers, improving discoverability
and reducing friction for new users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
